edge_hypothesis: Bollinger Band breakouts capture the moment of volatility expansion after compression. When price breaks above BBU_20_2.0 or below BBL_20_2.0, it signals that the market has exceeded its recent statistical range and is establishing a new directional move. The edge is timing-based: compression periods (narrow Bollinger width) precede expansion phases, and breakouts at the band edges represent genuine supply/demand imbalances. Volume confirmation (>1.5x average) filters false breakouts where price briefly pierces the band without conviction. This is fundamentally different from the ema_rsi_atr approach — instead of measuring trend alignment continuously, we wait for a single explosive event. ETH/1h shows PF=1.115 in ranging regimes, indicating mean-reversion/breakout dynamics exist at this timeframe. Bollinger breakout FROM a range should capture the transition to the next trending phase.
regime_assumption: Best when market transitions from ranging (low ADX, narrow bands) to trending (expanding bands, directional move). ETH/1h ranging PF=1.115 is the primary target. The strategy should fire rarely during already-trending markets (where bands are already wide). Invalidates if bands are persistently wide (already in trend, no compression setup).
invalidation_conditions: Trade count > 400 (too many entries means breakouts are not selective enough — lower vol_ratio_min threshold)
Ranging regime PF < 1.0 (the ranging edge hypothesis is wrong for this template)
Fee drag > 40% of gross profit (entries are too frequent despite volume filter)
Win rate < 30% with TP hit rate < 20% (breakouts are not following through)

variants.name: bband_breakout_high_conviction
variants.description: High-conviction Bollinger breakout requiring 1.5x average volume. Targets ETH/1h where ranging PF=1.115 suggests breakout dynamics exist. Wide TP (4.0 ATR) to let genuine breakouts run.
entry_long: Require close > BBU_20_2.0 on bar close (upper band breakout).
Require volume >= 1.5x 20-period volume average for conviction.
entry_short: Require close < BBL_20_2.0 on bar close (lower band breakout).
Require volume >= 1.5x 20-period volume average for conviction.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on price returning inside Bollinger bands (breakout failure).
Exit on opposite band breakout (reversal signal).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars for 1h).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout with immediate band re-entry
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Breakout during already-wide bands (trend, not compression)
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry (2.0:1 R:R).
Breakout failure: exit if price closes back inside bands within 3 bars.

components.notes: BBU/BBL_20_2.0 band breakout as entry signal
Volume ratio as breakout conviction filter

variants.name: bband_breakout_4h_wide
variants.description: Bollinger breakout on ETH/4h with wider stops and TP. Tests whether 4h timeframe produces fewer but higher-quality breakouts. Volume threshold lowered to 1.2x since 4h volume is less noisy.
entry_long: Require close > BBU_20_2.0 on bar close.
entry_short: Require close < BBL_20_2.0 on bar close.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on price returning inside Bollinger bands.
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (15 bars for 4h = 2.5 days).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout with immediate re-entry
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Band expansion during news-driven spike (non-persistent move)
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (wider for 4h persistence).
Take profit at 5.0x ATR_14 from entry (2.0:1 R:R).
4h breakouts should produce more persistent directional moves than 1h.

components.notes: Volume ratio confirmation for breakout conviction
